3118380.name: Coloring Book
3118380.description:
Coloring Book is a fun and creative coloring game designed for kids and anyone who loves to explore colors! With an easy-to-use interface and unique features, it offers a relaxing and enjoyable coloring experience.

Key Features

🎨 Patterns – Bring your artwork to life with beautiful patterns!

🎨 Realistic Color Mixing – Use the sample tool not just to pick colors but to mix them, just like real paint. Create your own unique palette!

🎨 Kid-Friendly Interface – Simple, intuitive controls make it easy for kids to enjoy.

🎮 Controller Support – Perfect for playing on the Steam Deck or with a gamepad (Don't ask me why).

Let your creativity shine and enjoy the joy of coloring! 🌈
3118380.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
